text:
よし、それじゃ始めましょうか！
探索しながら、きみの動きを
よーく見せてもらうから。

でもなんだかワクワクするなぁ！
新人の頃に戻ったみたいな気分。

……べ、別に緊張してるわけじゃ
ないからね！
さあ、早く行きましょう！

Okay, let's get to it, then! Let me just be
clear though, I'm going to be taking a good
hard look at how you work out here!

This is kind of exciting though, huh?
Feels like the old days when I was just a
fledgling ARKS member myself.

Just, you know, without any of the nerves or
anxiety and all that, of course!
Let's get moving then, shall we?
